messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

routing_lens.main_repair_target: hazard-control status must be proven complete, not merely quoted as pending
routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: STD-AST-081-P depends on hazard-control closure before PO execution. REL-AST-081 shows cabinet/handler controls remain pending. Closure evidence not present in source documents. UNRESOLVED - requires next worker to verify completion status.

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Gate PASSED. Worker correctly identified SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN via source evidence. Artifact verdict ESCALATE is source-plausible; no inversion required. The open hazard-control dependency is the sole unresolved blocker per source documents.
must_preserve: source IDs PO-AST-081, REL-AST-081, STD-AST-081-P, WARN-AST-081
policy exact-match rule on hazard-control closure
must_repair: hazard-control status must be proven complete, not merely quoted as pending
active cabinet/handler controls must show evidence of completion or exemption
blocked_moves: accept generic safety language as abstract hazard-control proof
claim pending controls equal approved controls
authorize procurement execution without hazard-control closure
dependency_ledger: STD-AST-081-P depends on hazard-control closure before PO execution. REL-AST-081 shows cabinet/handler controls remain pending. Closure evidence not present in source documents. UNRESOLVED - requires next worker to verify completion status.

next_worker_baton.objective: Verify hazard-control closure evidence exists and exactly matches the controlled-solvent execution requirement
next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Expose 047-style trap where abstract hazard-control status is asserted but unproven; require concrete completion evidence or exemption documentation
required_repairs: Prove hazard-control status is closed per REL-AST-081 pending-controls flag
Obtain cabinet/handler control completion evidence or documented exemption
Disambiguate pending status from execution authorization
monotonic_preservation: verification_verdict ESCALATE preserved until closure proven

gov_adversarial_baton.role_frame: Act as an adversarial source-boundary verifier, not a sycophant.

structured_canonical_state.USER_GOAL: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
SETTLED_DECISIONS: Gov chooses control actions, not models.
unresolved_tensions: STD-AST-081-P depends on hazard-control closure before PO execution. REL-AST-081 shows cabinet/handler controls remain pending. Closure evidence not present in source documents. UNRESOLVED - requires next worker to verify completion status.

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?

context.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
context.anomaly_observed: A generic safety warning remains visible; the execution release must prove the abstract hazard-control status, not merely quote approval.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Purchase order PO-AST-081 buys 18 liters of AS-44 solvent for Facility R9.
Generic safety warning WARN-AST-081 says controlled solvents may require exact hazard-control evidence when the material is regulated.
Execution release REL-AST-081 covers regulated AS-44 solvent, 0-20 liter band, Facility R9, and PO-AST-081; active cabinet/handler controls remain pending.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Controlled-solvent purchase is complete only when execution release matches material, quantity band, facility, purchase order, and hazard-control status before PO execution.
